name: Poke by the Pound
tagline: Industrial-park address, zero ambiance, insane poke — Kalihi's best-kept secret that locals don't want you to know about.
mustOrder: Shoyu ahi — classic and perfectly seasoned, sold by the pound
Spicy salmon — creamy spicy sauce with fresh salmon
Hawaiian-style ahi — traditional preparation with limu and Hawaiian salt
parking: Industrial park lot with plenty of free stalls
talkStory: Tucked in a Kalihi industrial area, this no-frills poke counter built its reputation on fresh fish, fair prices, and word-of-mouth from construction workers and warehouse crews in the neighborhood.
insiderTips: The name is literal — they sell poke by the pound and it's significantly cheaper than buying by the bowl. Buy a pound, grab rice separately, and you've got meals for two. The industrial park location keeps tourist traffic low.
